summary: Comprehensive testing of Carrier Integration feature. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all features including carrier list, connection status, sync functionality, disconnect/connect flow, and sync history.
passed_tests: GET /api/carriers returns list of 5 carriers (bcbs, uhc, aetna, cigna, humana) with plan counts
GET /api/carriers/{carrier_id}/plans returns plans for specific carrier (BCBS has 3 plans: PPO, HMO, HDHP)
GET /api/carriers/invalid_carrier/plans returns 404
All 5 carriers return plans with correct structure
POST /api/carriers/connect/{employer_id} connects employer to carrier and stores connection
POST /api/carriers/connect with invalid carrier returns 404
POST /api/carriers/connect with invalid employer returns 404
GET /api/carriers/connection/{employer_id} returns connection status (connected: true/false)
GET /api/carriers/connection for non-existent employer returns connected: false
POST /api/carriers/sync/{employer_id} syncs enrollment data and returns enrolled/waived/not_offered counts
Sync creates plans from carrier data if they don't exist
Sync updates employee records with plan_id, plan_name, coverage_tier, premiums
Duplicate carrier sync does not create duplicate plans (plans_created: 0 on second sync)
GET /api/carriers/sync-history/{employer_id} returns list of sync logs with results
GET /api/carriers/sync-detail/{sync_id} returns full sync detail including individual employee enrollments
GET /api/carriers/sync-detail with invalid ID returns 404
DELETE /api/carriers/disconnect/{employer_id} removes carrier connection
DELETE /api/carriers/disconnect when not connected returns 404
Sync without carrier connection returns 400 error
Carriers endpoint requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Frontend: Carrier Integration page loads at /carrier
Frontend: Navigation sidebar has 'Carrier Integration' item with data-testid
Frontend: Connected carrier shows with 'Connected' badge, Sync Now and Disconnect buttons
Frontend: After sync, Sync Results card shows Total, Enrolled, Waived, Not Offered, Plans Created stats
Frontend: Employee Assignments table shows employee name, status, plan, tier, EE premium, ER premium
Frontend: Sync History section shows previous sync runs with enrolled/waived/plans counts
Frontend: Clicking sync history item expands to show detail
Frontend: Disconnect removes carrier connection and shows 5 carrier cards
Frontend: 5 carrier cards displayed when not connected (BCBS, UHC, Aetna, Cigna, Humana)
Frontend: View Plans button expands to show carrier plans with type badges
Frontend: Connect dialog opens with carrier info, group number input, and Mock Integration notice
Frontend: Connect button in dialog successfully connects to carrier

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all carrier integration UI components and flows working)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create unique test employers with UUID-based names for connect/disconnect tests. Test data is cleaned up after tests.

mocked_apis.carrier_enrollment_api: All carrier APIs are MOCK/simulated. Enrollment data is generated using randomized but realistic data. No real insurance carrier API calls are made.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Carrier Integration feature fully tested and working. Full carrier lifecycle verified: list carriers → view plans → connect → sync → view sync results → view sync history → disconnect. BCBS is connected for test@demo.com's employer 'Demo Corp'. Plans from carrier sync (Blue Choice PPO, Blue Preferred HMO, Blue HDHP with HSA) exist in plans collection. Sync updates payroll_employees collection with plan assignments. Employee profiles collection is empty - sync uses payroll_employees.

sync_flow.returns: sync_id, carrier_name, total_employees, results (enrolled/waived/not_offered/plans_created), enrollments array

duplicate_prevention.description: Second sync does not create duplicate plans

employee_data_persistence.description: Employee records updated with plan assignments after sync
